run() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Network.ClientSideSocketHandler
Start the socket connection It sends a "ping" to the server and waits for a "pong" to be received.
run() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Network.ServerSideSocketHandler
Start the socket connection It waits for messages from the client, executes the corresponding operations and sends and update message to the client.
